storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from a terrestrial mountain setting to a supernatural interior through a controlled lighting shift and physiological decline. The sequence must emphasize the scale of the ancient chamber relative to the lone protagonist before his sudden loss of consciousness.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Younger)

## Required Environments
- ancient_cliffside_cave (High cliffside trail and Ancient Cave interior)

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting transition from bright exterior to dark/dim cave
- Visual cues for unnatural drowsiness (heavy eyelids, blurred vision)

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter follows horse to cave entrance
- BT002: Entry into ancient chamber
- BT003: Unnatural drowsiness and collapse
